200.html:
data

[object]

A list of RUM permanent retention filters.

id

string

Permanent retention filter ID.

type

enum

The type of the resource. The value should always be permanent_retention_filters. Allowed enum values: permanent_retention_filters

default: permanent_retention_filters

attributes

object

The attributes of a permanent retention filter.

name

string

The name of a permanent retention filter. Read-only.

event_type

enum

The type of RUM events the filter applies to. Read-only. Allowed enum values: session,view,action,error,resource,long_task,vital,operation

query

string

The query string for a permanent retention filter. Read-only.

sample_rate

double

The retention sample rate for a permanent retention filter, between 0 and 100. Read-only.

enabled

boolean

Whether the permanent retention filter is active. Read-only.

cross_product_sampling

object

Cross-product retention settings for a permanent retention filter.

session_replay_sample_rate

double

Percentage (0–100) of retained sessions (with an ingested replay) whose replay is kept.

session_replay_enabled

boolean

Whether Session Replay cross-product retention is active. Read-only.

trace_sample_rate

double

Percentage (0–100) of retained sessions (with ingested traces) whose traces are indexed.

trace_enabled

boolean

Whether Trace cross-product retention is active. Read-only.

cross_product_sampling_editability

object

Flags indicating which cross_product_sampling rates can be updated for this filter. Read-only.

session_replay_sample_rate

boolean

If true, cross_product_sampling.session_replay_sample_rate can be updated on this filter.

trace_sample_rate

boolean

If true, cross_product_sampling.trace_sample_rate can be updated on this filter.

meta

object

Metadata about the permanent retention filter.

source

enum

The source of the last update to a permanent retention filter. Allowed enum values: default,ui,terraform

updated_at

int64

Unix epoch (in milliseconds) of the last update.

updated_by_handle

string

Handle of the user who last updated the filter.

request.html:
data [required]

object

The permanent retention filter properties to update.

id [required]

string

Permanent retention filter ID.

type [required]

enum

The type of the resource. The value should always be permanent_retention_filters. Allowed enum values: permanent_retention_filters

default: permanent_retention_filters

attributes [required]

object

The attributes of a permanent retention filter that can be updated.

cross_product_sampling

object

Partial update of the cross-product sample rates of a permanent retention filter. Only the rates whose matching cross_product_sampling_editability flag is true can be updated.

session_replay_sample_rate

double

Percentage (0–100) of retained sessions (with an ingested replay) whose replay is kept. Omit to leave unchanged. Rejected if the filter's cross_product_sampling_editability.session_replay_sample_rate is false.

trace_sample_rate

double

Percentage (0–100) of retained sessions (with ingested traces) whose traces are indexed. Omit to leave unchanged. Rejected if the filter's cross_product_sampling_editability.trace_sample_rate is false.
